inputs.label: Asset Cost
inputs.businessContext: Initial cost of the asset, including purchase price, installation, and delivery.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial cost of the asset, including purchase price, installation, and delivery.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın satın alma fiyatı, kurulum ve nakliye dahil ilk maliyeti.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated residual value of the asset at the end of its useful life.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated residual value of the asset at the end of its useful life.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın faydalı ömrü sonunda tahmini kalıntı değeri.

inputs.label: Useful Life
inputs.businessContext: Expected duration the asset will be productive, in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected duration the asset will be productive, in years.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın üretken olması beklenen süre, yıl cinsinden.

inputs.label: Years Elapsed
inputs.businessContext: Number of years the asset has been in use, used to compute accumulated depreciation and book value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years the asset has been in use, used to compute accumulated depreciation and book value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın kullanımda olduğu yıl sayısı, birikmiş amortisman ve defter değerini hesaplamak için kullanılır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
